steps.text: Hoist the sails! {quest_giver} is captain of a pirate ship sailing across {room}.
Climb to the crow's nest (a chair or cushion) and shout what you see to {friend}.
A storm hits! Rock {quest_giver} side to side and brace against the waves.
The lookout spots an island. Steer toward it with {quest_giver} at the wheel.
On the beach, two paths split — which way does {quest_giver} lead?
You hack through vines and find buried treasure! {quest_giver} crowns {friend} First Mate.
You climb high and spot another ship — {quest_giver} signals with a flag and you trade gold.
Strap {friend} into the rocket! {room} is mission control.
Count down from {count} loud and clear.
Blast off! Crouch low then leap up high holding {friend}.
Float weightless — wave your arms slowly like an astronaut.
An alien ship appears on the radar. Squint and focus.
What does {friend} do about the aliens?
The aliens cheer and teach {friend} a {adjective} space dance — show me your moves!
You blast home in record time and {friend} earns the Speed Pilot badge.
{friend} is the brave knight defending the castle of {room}.
Build a fort wall with cushions or chairs — three pieces will do.
Patrol the perimeter with {friend} held high like a banner.
A dragon roars in the distance! Listen carefully.
How does {friend} face the dragon?
You leap forward swinging your {body_part} like a sword! The dragon flees.
You tiptoe behind the dragon and tickle its tail. It giggles and rolls over!
You offer a {prop} and the dragon snuggles up. {friend} has a new friend.
{friend} packs the explorer kit — you're heading deep into the jungle of {room}.
Hack through tall grass by waving your arms like machetes.
Listen for jungle sounds — chirps, hoots, distant drums.
Spot a {adjective} animal hiding behind a {prop} — describe it to {friend}.
A river blocks the path. The water roars below.
How does {friend} cross the river?
You leap and swing yodeling — {friend} cheers from the other side. You made it!
You stack three pillows into a raft and paddle across with {friend} steering.
{friend} suits up — it's a deep sea dive into the secret ocean of {room}.
Which sea creature does {friend} want to find first?
You drift through dark water and the jellyfish glows {adjective} pink!
You squeeze through a porthole and find barnacled chests inside.
The whale sings a low rumble and lets {friend} ride on its back.
All paths lead to a sunken treasure chest! Pry it open with {friend}.
Inside are pearls and a magic {prop}. {friend} declares you Captain of the Deep!
{friend} smells dinosaurs nearby — grab the binoculars and scout {room}.
Which trail does {friend} follow?
You stomp like a T-rex following the prints, shaking the floor!
You tiptoe like a velociraptor, watching for traps.
Both trails lead to a nest! Three speckled eggs sit inside.
An egg cracks — a baby dino peeks out and snuggles up to {friend}.
Mission accepted! {friend} gets a secret coded message about {room}.
Sneak across the floor without making a sound — silent as a cat.
Hide behind a {prop} and peek out for clues.
Decode the secret message by counting to {count} backward.
An alarm trips! Red lights flash everywhere.
How does {friend} escape headquarters?
You crawl on your tummy through the vent and pop out outside. Mission accomplished!
You wrap a blanket cape on {friend} and march right past the guards. Smooth!
The kitchen is a volcano and {friend} is on a rescue mission to {room}!
Lava is everywhere — leap from cushion to cushion only.
Spot {needs_saving} stranded on a ledge — point out where they are!
Toss a rope (a scarf or sock) toward {needs_saving} for the rescue.
The volcano rumbles louder! Smoke fills the air.
How does {friend} get everyone out?
You sprint with {friend} tucked under your arm. Safe outside! Cheers all around.
A helicopter lowers a ladder. {friend} climbs up and waves from the sky.
Step right up! {quest_giver} is the ringmaster of the {room} circus.
Which circus act does {quest_giver} perform first?
Walk a straight line heel-to-toe with {quest_giver} balanced on your head!
Roar mighty roars and hold up a ring — the lion (a pillow) leaps through!
Toss three soft toys gently up and down. {quest_giver} keeps score.
Time for the grand finale — everyone bows together as the crowd cheers!
{friend} found robot blueprints hidden in {room}!
Gather {count} household objects to be robot parts.
Snap the parts together with imaginary bolts and screws.
Power on! Make a long beeeeeep sound and shake your {body_part}.
What is the robot's special ability?
The robot lifts the entire couch (pretend!) and {friend} rides on top!
PEW PEW! Laser eyes melt invisible obstacles. {friend} salutes the new hero.
The robot does the {adjective} disco shuffle and {friend} joins in!
{friend} just got accepted to wizard school! Class is in {room}.
Pick up your wand (any nearby {prop}) and practice swishing it.
Chant the magic word: ABRA-{action_verb}-CADABRA! Say it three times.
Sparks fly! Your potion is bubbling over.
A {adjective} owl swoops in carrying a sealed letter for {friend}.
The letter says pick a magical specialty:
Whoosh! Snap your fingers and pretend a fireball appears. {friend} bows to your power.
A flock of birds (pretend!) circles {friend} and you can talk to every one.
Crisis! The city of {room} needs a superhero — that's {friend}!
Tie a blanket cape around your shoulders.
Strike your hero pose — hands on hips, chin up high.
An emergency call! Listen for the siren.
Run to the scene as fast as you can with {friend}.
Two emergencies at once! Who does {friend} save first?

choices.label: A cat stuck in a tree
A baby in a runaway stroller

steps.text: You leap up and gently lift the cat down. The whole crowd cheers for {friend}!
You sprint to catch the stroller and skid to a stop. The baby giggles. Hero!
All aboard! {quest_giver} is conductor of the express train through {room}.
Which destination does {quest_giver} call out?
Climb-climb-climb the steep hills! Lean back as the train tilts up.
Roll past sandy dunes — wave at sea birds out the window.
Smell the cookies baking — the rails turn into chocolate streams!
All trains pass through the long dark tunnel. Make a loud TOOT-TOOT!
You arrive at last. {quest_giver} stamps your ticket and you cheer together!
{friend} wants to go camping right here in {room}!
Build a tent from blankets and chairs. Make it cozy.
Crawl inside with {friend} and a flashlight (or pretend one).
Listen for nighttime sounds — owls, crickets, leaves rustling.
What do you do at the campsite?
You whisper a tale of a {adjective} ghost. {friend} hides under the blanket — boo!
Stick a marshmallow on a twig and rotate slowly. Yum — sticky and gooey!
Chef {quest_giver} is opening a five-star restaurant in {room}. Tie on your apron!
What kind of dish is {quest_giver} making tonight?
Stir the giant pot fast. Add a {adjective} pinch of imaginary spice!
Whisk the batter — beat your {body_part} like a mixer!
Toss the leaves high in the air — catch them like a tossing master!
Now plate it beautifully. Garnish with imaginary flowers and ring the bell!
The food critic ({quest_giver}) takes a bite and gives you {count} stars!
{quest_giver} is opening the world's best car wash in {room}!
Wave drivers in by pointing at imaginary cars zooming up.
Spray water (pretend) all over the first car. Make a SHHHHH sound.
Scrub-scrub-scrub the {adjective} car with big arm circles.
Rinse off the soap with a big imaginary hose.
Drying time! How does {quest_giver} get the car shiny?
WHOOOSH! Pretend a giant fan blasts the car dry. Your hair flies back!
Pat-pat-pat with imaginary towels. Sparkly clean! {quest_giver} hands you a tip.
Welcome to the zoo! {guide_mentor} is your tour guide through {room}.
Which exhibit does {guide_mentor} visit first?
The lion lets out a mighty ROAR! Roar back, even louder!
The monkeys swing and screech! Scratch your head and act silly.
The snake hisses and slithers. Wiggle on the floor like a snake!
It's feeding time! Help {guide_mentor} pretend-feed a treat to the animals.
Wave goodbye to all the animals. {guide_mentor} thanks you for the visit!
Detective {quest_giver} just got a case — a missing {prop} in {room}!
Pull out your magnifying glass (cup your hand) and search the area.
Find {count} suspicious clues — point at each one.
Question a suspect (a stuffed animal or pillow) with serious questions.
Suddenly, a new clue! A {adjective} smudge on the wall.
All eyes on the suspects! Who does {quest_giver} accuse?
The teddy confesses! {quest_giver} cracks the case and you both shake hands.
The toy car races away — you chase it down and recover the {prop}!
Welcome to the {room} Olympics! {friend} is your champion.
Stretch your arms up high and touch your toes for warmup.
Which event does {friend} compete in?
Take {count} big steps back, run forward, and LEAP!
On your marks... GO! Run in place super fast for ten seconds.
Walk a straight line heel-to-toe, arms out wide. Don't fall off!
Step onto the podium. {friend} hangs an imaginary gold medal around your neck!
{frenemy} dares you to enter the haunted house — actually it's just {room}!
Creak open the imaginary door slowly... eeeeerrrr...
Tiptoe past a spooky portrait. Its eyes seem to follow you.
Hear a ghostly OOOOOOOO! Hold {frenemy} tight.
A {adjective} cobweb tickles your face! Brush it off your {body_part}.
Two creaky doors block the way out — pick fast!
It opens to a friendly ghost party! Everyone dances. {frenemy} joins in!
It leads to sunny daylight outside. You and {frenemy} cheer — escape!
Mission briefing: {friend} the ninja must cross {room} unseen!
Tie an imaginary headband and crouch down low.
Tiptoe past invisible laser beams — duck under and step over.
Roll behind a {prop} when the guard turns around.
How does {friend} reach the scroll?
You scale up using imaginary handholds. Snatch the scroll! Mission accomplished.
POOF! Throw down the smoke and dash through. {friend} bows in approval.
Grab the binoculars — {guide_mentor} is leading a safari through {room}!
Which habitat does {guide_mentor} explore?
Trudge through hot sand. Spot a camel resting under a {adjective} tree.
Sneak through tall grass — a giraffe nibbles leaves nearby.
Climb misty rocks — a snow leopard watches from above.
All trails lead to the watering hole. Sit quietly with {guide_mentor} and watch the animals drink.
An elephant trumpets goodbye! Wave back with both arms.
Brrrr! {friend} bundles up — the temperature in {room} just dropped to arctic!
Strap on imaginary snowshoes and trudge through deep snow.
Scan the icy horizon for a {adjective} polar bear.
Crack! Thin ice underfoot — leap to a sturdy floe!
How does {friend} reach the research base?
Mush mush! Pretend to crack the reins and the dogs zoom across the ice. Yip yip!
Crunch through ice with the ship's mighty hull. {friend} steers from the bridge.
It's market day! {friend} sets up a stall in busy {room}.
What does {friend} sell at the market?
Bottle up sparkly imaginary liquids. Shout: GET YOUR {adjective} POTIONS!
Stack pretend apples and oranges in pyramids. Polish each one shiny.
Display silly hats on your {body_part} to attract customers.
A customer wants to haggle! Offer {count} coins back and forth.
Sold! High-five {friend} — the stall is a hit!
Listen carefully — {friend} hears tiny bells in the corner of {room}.
Which fairy does {friend} meet first?
Pink petals swirl around. The flower fairy hops onto your {body_part}!
Tiny droplets sparkle. The water fairy splashes {friend} and giggles.
All the fairies invite you to a dance. Spin slowly with {friend} held high.
The fairies leave a {adjective} flower as thanks. Tuck it safe with {friend}.
Engines roar! {friend} is the star driver at the {room} speedway.
Buckle up. Squeeze the steering wheel tight!
On your marks... GO! Run in place super fast — vroooom!
A sharp turn ahead! Lean to one side dramatically.
Two cars are right beside you at the final lap!
WHOOSH! You blast past everyone and cross the finish line first. Trophy time!
You squeak through a tight gap and edge ahead at the line. Victory by an inch!
Land ho! {quest_giver} unfolds a tattered map of {room} with X marks the spot.
Wade through pretend tide pools — careful of the crabs!
Push through palm fronds — wave your arms to part the leaves.
Spot the X on the ground. Dig with imaginary shovels!
Clunk! You hit the treasure chest. Pry it open with a {prop}.
Lift the lid slowly — what's inside the chest?
Coins everywhere! Toss them in the air with {quest_giver} laughing beside you.
A glowing {adjective} key! It opens a secret door — what's behind it next time?
{quest_giver} declares it's a tasting tour through {room} — {count} stops total!
Which station does {quest_giver} sample first?
WHOA spicy! Fan your {body_part} and stomp around!
Mmmmm sweet! Smile huge and rub your tummy.
PUCKER! Squish your face and shiver all over!
Now {quest_giver} judges — give the dish a thumbs up or thumbs down!
The chef hands you a winner's ribbon. {quest_giver} pins it on you proudly!
Fire up the burner! {friend}'s hot air balloon rises above {room}.
Which way does the wind blow {friend}?
Float through fluffy clouds. Reach out and grab a handful — soft and bouncy!
Sail over a shimmering rainbow river. Wave at the colorful fish below.
Time to descend! Pull the rope gently and the balloon settles down.
You and {friend} step out and bow to the crowd that's gathered. What a journey!
Crown {quest_giver}! Today {quest_giver} rules the kingdom of {room}.
Sit {quest_giver} on a throne (a chair with a blanket).
Bow before the king and present a {prop} as a royal gift.
A royal messenger arrives! Read the urgent letter aloud.
Royal decree time! What does King {quest_giver} command?
Roll out the feast! Pretend-eat seven courses with your royal {body_part}!
March {count} knights out the door — {quest_giver} watches from the balcony, proud.
{quest_giver} sets up an obstacle course in {room} — but you can ONLY use your {body_part}!
First trial: {action_verb} across the room using only your {body_part} for balance.
Pick up a {prop} using ONLY your {body_part}. No hands allowed!
Carry the {prop} {count} steps without dropping it.
Final challenge time — what does {quest_giver} pick?
Hop {count} times in a row holding the {prop} on your {body_part}. Champion!
Wiggle every part of you while holding {quest_giver}. {quest_giver} laughs uncontrollably!
Find a {prop}, a second {prop}, and a third — line them up across {room}.
Now {action_verb} from the first {prop} to the second.
{action_verb} from the second {prop} to the third — keep your {body_part} steady!
{quest_giver} times the next round. Go fast or go fancy?
Race back through the props in {count} seconds! {quest_giver} cheers — new record!
Spin and twirl past each {prop} like a {adjective} dancer. {quest_giver} claps in awe.
{quest_giver} challenges you to {action_verb} {count} times in a row across {room}!
First {action_verb}: do it {adjective} — {quest_giver} judges the style.
Second {action_verb}: do it sideways while waving a {prop}.
Third {action_verb}: do it backward holding {quest_giver} on your {body_part}.
Encore time! Pick the grand finale:
Crouch low and LAUNCH! Biggest {action_verb} of the day — {quest_giver} gives a 10!
Move sloooowly like a sloth. Every motion stretches forever. {quest_giver} giggles.
{guide_mentor} casts a spell — {room} is now an entirely new place!
What does {room} transform into?
Squelch through mud — lift your {body_part} high with each step!
Crawl through the dark cave — your {body_part} brushes the rocky walls.
Float weightless — kick your {body_part} like swimming through air!
A {adjective} creature appears with a {prop} in its claws!
{guide_mentor} trades a smile for the {prop}. New friend made — quest done!
{quest_giver} hands you a quest scroll — exactly {count} tasks await in {room}.
Task one: find {count} {adjective} objects and pile them up.
Task two: {action_verb} around the pile {count} times.
Task three: balance a {prop} on your {body_part} for {count} seconds.
Final task — {quest_giver} lets you pick:
ROOOOAARRR {count} times! {quest_giver} flinches then bursts into laughter.
Sing LA-LA-LA at the top of your lungs! {quest_giver} conducts with a {prop}.
{friend} is feeling {adjective} today. Match the energy in {room}!
Walk {adjective}-style across the room — show {friend} how.
Pick up a {prop} the {adjective} way and carry it on your {body_part}.
Now {friend} changes mood. Pick a new feeling:
Tiptoe past {friend} without a sound. Don't even let your {body_part} squeak!
Shout your name {count} times and stomp around. {friend} cheers wildly!
Drift around with arms outstretched, humming softly. {friend} sways with you.
Quick — find a {adjective} {prop} hidden somewhere in {room}.
Hold the {adjective} {prop} on your {body_part} and walk to {guide_mentor}.
{guide_mentor} inspects it carefully — is it the right one? Spin it slowly.
{guide_mentor}'s verdict is in — what happens with the {prop} next?

choices.label: Use it as a magic wand

steps.text: Wave the {prop} and shout {action_verb}! Sparks fly from your {body_part}!
Find a different {prop} and swap. {guide_mentor} approves — better choice!
{friend} starts a brand new dance craze: the {body_part} shimmy!
Move only your {body_part} for {count} seconds. The rest of you stays still!
Now add a {prop} — twirl it as your {body_part} keeps shaking!
Tempo change! How does {friend} call it?
Shake your {body_part} as fast as you can! {friend} can barely keep up!
Move your {body_part} sloooooooowly like underwater. {friend} hums along.
{friend} invents a game: every step you {action_verb} adds a new layer!
Layer one: just {action_verb} across {room}.
Layer two: {action_verb} while waving a {prop}.
Layer three: {action_verb} {adjective}-style with {friend} on your {body_part}!
Boss layer time — pick the wildest twist:
{action_verb} with the silliest face you can make! {friend} can't stop laughing!
Shout HOORAY at every step! Your voice echoes off the walls.
{quest_giver} marks {count} stations around {room}. It's a relay!
At station one: {action_verb} in place {count} times.
Sprint to station two: balance a {prop} on your {body_part}.
Sprint to station three: do a {adjective} pose for {quest_giver} to admire.
Finish line approaches! How do you cross it?
Crouch low and LAUNCH across the line! {quest_giver} celebrates the photo finish!
Twirl all the way across. Wave at {quest_giver} mid-spin — what a stylish finish!
Showdown! {frenemy} stands at the other end of {room}. Pick your move:
ZIP! Whip out a finger-pistol and shout BANG! {frenemy} clutches its chest dramatically.
Wink, then dance instead. {frenemy} laughs so hard it falls over!
Dance wildly with {quest_giver} until you hear the magic word!
FREEZE! {quest_giver} calls a pose — which one?
Hold perfectly still! Don't even blink. {quest_giver} inspects with a magnifying eye.
Freeze in a {adjective} animal shape — {quest_giver} guesses which one!
{quest_giver} sets a {count}-second timer. Ready, set...
GO! What burst does {quest_giver} pick?
{action_verb} as fast as you can until time's up! {quest_giver} shouts STOP!
Make the wackiest noises possible — {quest_giver} laughs the whole way through!
Stand face-to-face with {friend}. Whatever {friend} does, you copy!
Pick the mirror challenge {friend} starts with:
Move sloooowly — every motion of your {body_part} mirrors {friend}'s.
Pull the silliest face you can! {friend} matches it back. Crack up first loses!
Lean in close — {friend} has a secret to share in {room}.
{friend} whispers — what's the secret about?
There's a {adjective} treasure under the couch! Tiptoe over to check.
{friend} is throwing you a surprise party! Pretend to be surprised!
Wave your {body_part} and chant {action_verb}! Sparks fly (in your mind).
An ancient prophecy! {friend} must save {room} from a curse.
Pack your bag — grab a {prop}, a snack, and a brave heart.
Cross the threshold and step outside the safe zone.
{guide_mentor} greets you with a riddle. Think hard about your answer.
{guide_mentor} points to two roads:
Trees rustle around you. A talking fox offers a clue.
Climb high — your {body_part} aches. A snow goat shows the way.
The cursed beast appears! It has {count} heads, all roaring.
How does {friend} defeat the beast?
BAM! The {prop} strikes true and the curse lifts. {friend} crowns you a hero!
The beast laughs so hard the curse shatters. {friend} bursts into proud applause!
Buckle up! {guide_mentor} announces a world tour starting from {room}.
First stop: hot desert. Trudge through pretend sand dunes.
Spot a camel — wave hello and feed it an imaginary date.
Second stop: snowy tundra. Shiver and rub your arms!
Build a tiny snowman with {guide_mentor} (or a sock pile).
Third stop: rainforest. Listen for monkey calls and bird trills.
Which path does {guide_mentor} choose in the rainforest?
Climb tall trees! Swing arm-over-arm like a monkey holding {guide_mentor}.
Wade into pretend water — splash with your {body_part}!
All trails head home. Board the imaginary plane and buckle in.
Touchdown back in {room}! Wave at every souvenir you didn't bring.
Punch the time clock! {quest_giver} runs the toy factory in {room}.
Inspect the conveyor belt — your {body_part} is the scanner.
Stack {count} imaginary boxes neatly in a row.
ALERT! A box is wobbling. Steady it carefully!
Lunch break decision — what does {quest_giver} do?
Run-run-run! Pick up {count} more boxes super fast!
Sketch a {adjective} new toy design with {quest_giver} cheering you on.
Time to ship! Load the imaginary truck with all your boxes.
Wave goodbye as the truck rolls out. {quest_giver} hangs the EMPLOYEE-OF-THE-MONTH sign on you!
Curtain up soon! {quest_giver} casts you in the {room} school play.
Audition warmup — say HELLO {count} different ways.
Try a {adjective} accent. {quest_giver} nods approval.
Now act sad — let your {body_part} droop dramatically.
Costume time — drape a blanket and grab a {prop}.
Which role does {quest_giver} cast you in?
Strike a hero pose — feet wide, hands on hips, chin high!
Cackle MWA-HA-HA and rub your hands together slowly.
Trip over your own feet (on purpose!) and bonk into {quest_giver}.
SHOWTIME! Deliver your big line loud and proud.
Take three bows. {quest_giver} hands you a bouquet of imaginary flowers!
{friend} discovers a secret hatch hidden under a {prop} in {room}!
Pry it open with your {body_part} — the hinges creak loudly.
Climb down a rope ladder, one rung at a time.
It's pitch dark. Click on your imaginary headlamp.
Tunnels branch in many directions — listen for echoes.
Three tunnels stretch ahead. Which does {friend} pick?
Follow the glow — {count} crystals light the walls.
Splash through ankle-deep water. Each step echoes.
The wind tugs you forward. Lean in and walk steady.
All tunnels meet in a giant chamber! A sleeping creature is curled up inside.
The creature stirs — do you wake it or sneak past?
It yawns and grins — turns out it's friendly! It walks you home with {friend}.
Tiptoe past holding your breath. You climb back up — quest survived!
{quest_giver} climbs the spiral stairs of the lighthouse in {room}.
Light the big lamp! Wave a {prop} in slow circles to send the beam.
Fog rolls in. Squint hard with {friend} to spot ships.
A boat is in trouble! How does {quest_giver} help?
Flash {count} times — the ship sees you and finds the harbor!
Paddle hard with {friend}! You tow the boat home with everyone safe.
Open the bakery in {room}! {sidekick} ties on the apron.
Knead pretend dough — squish, squish, squish with your {body_part}!
Stack {count} pretend cupcakes high on a {prop}.
A customer arrives. What does {sidekick} sell first?
Spin the tray! {sidekick} hands over a stack of donuts and gets a giant tip.
Sniff the bread — mmm! {sidekick} sells out the whole batch.
Surprise! It's a whipped-cream pie. {sidekick} giggles and gives it free.
{quest_giver} pilots the submarine. {friend} watches the periscope.
Dive! Crouch lower and lower until you're flat on the floor.
Spin the hatch wheel with both hands — turn, turn, turn!
A whale glides past! Press your {body_part} to the window.
Sonar pings something strange. What is it?
Gold coins everywhere! {friend} scoops {count} into a sack.
Wiggle eight arms like the squid does. {quest_giver} steers around it!
{guide_mentor} ties a rope around {friend}'s waist for the climb.
Step up high — knees lift, knees lift! Climb invisible rocks in {room}.
Wind howls! Lean into it with {friend} so you don't blow over.
{guide_mentor} points up — which path?
Tippy-toe across the ice with your {body_part} flat. You reach the summit!
Skip up the sunny slope! At the top {friend} plants a {prop} flag.
BING BING BING! {helper_townsperson} jumps into the fire engine.
Hold the steering wheel and zoom through {room} — vroom!
{needs_saving} is stuck in a tree! Look up high.
How does {helper_townsperson} rescue {needs_saving}?
Crank the ladder up! {needs_saving} climbs down step by step.
Spread a {prop} as the mat! {needs_saving} jumps and lands giggling.
Step into the orchard with {friend}. Trees full of pretend apples line {room}.
Stretch up — reach with your {body_part} and pick {count} apples.
Drop them into a {prop} basket. Plunk, plunk, plunk!
What does {friend} make with the apples?
Roll the dough! {friend} bakes a {adjective} pie and shares slices.
Stomp the apples in a pretend barrel — squish squish! Cider for all.
{quest_giver} unrolls a blueprint in {room}. Time to invent!
Gather scraps — a {prop}, a sock, anything {adjective}!
What is {quest_giver} building?
Flip your arms like spatulas! The robot tosses {count} pancakes.
Wiggle every {body_part}! The machine tickles {quest_giver} silly.
Leap up high to catch invisible clouds. {quest_giver} bottles one.
{helper_townsperson} sorts the mail in the post office of {room}.
Stamp {count} letters loud — STAMP STAMP STAMP with your {body_part}!
Load the mail truck with a {prop} bag full of envelopes.
{friend} waits for delivery. What's in the letter?
{friend} reads the card — it's a birthday surprise! Wave a happy banner.
Shake the package — what's inside? Open carefully with {friend}!
{guide_mentor} whispers — a {adjective} dragon roams the hills.
Tiptoe close, very slowly, on your {body_part}.
ROAR! {big_bad_boss} appears in {room}. Stand brave!
How does {guide_mentor} tame the dragon?
The dragon sniffs the {prop} and purrs! {big_bad_boss} curls up for a nap.
Hum a soft tune — {big_bad_boss} closes its eyes and snores tiny puffs.
{guide_mentor} answers the riddle! {big_bad_boss} bows and joins your team.
Open the garage in {room}! {sidekick} grabs a {prop} wrench.
Lift the hood — pretend to peer inside the {adjective} engine.
What's wrong with the car?
Pump up the tire! Squat-stand-squat-stand {count} times.
Twist your {body_part} like a wrench — turn the bolts tight!
{trickster} floats {count} pretend balloons across {room}.
Chase them with {friend}! Leap and bop each one with your {body_part}.
{trickster} grabs the last balloon. What do you do?
Tippy-toe close, then POP! {friend} bursts the balloon. Confetti everywhere!
Wiggly fingers attack {trickster}! It giggles and drops the balloon.
Welcome to the dolphin show in {room}! {friend} is the star.
Splish-splash! Wiggle and dive with your {body_part} like fins.
{friend} leaps through {count} pretend hoops!
Big finale — what does {friend} do?
WHOOSH! Spin once with {friend}. The crowd cheers!
Wave slowly. Bow low with {friend}. Applause echoes!
{quest_giver} jumps in the storm-chaser truck — {room} is the wide open road.
Wind whips! Rumble of thunder shakes the floor.
Spot the funnel! Point with {friend} — there, there!
{quest_giver} chooses — chase or shelter?
Spin and twirl like the tornado! {friend} snaps {count} pictures.
Crouch under a {prop}! Whisper until the storm passes.
Step into the aquarium! Big tanks line {room}.
Press your {body_part} to the glass. Sharks glide past!
Spot {count} sea creatures and count them out loud with {friend}.
{friend} wants to visit which tank next?
Float arms slowly like jellyfish. Drift around {room}!
Wiggle eight arms! Octopus changes color. So do you — {adjective}!
Waddle like a penguin with {friend}! Splash into the pool together.
{guide_mentor} hands you a {prop} brush. Time to dig in {room}!
Crouch low. Brush gently — sweep, sweep, sweep!
Find {count} hidden bones. Lay them in a row.
What did you uncover?
Stand tall like a long-neck! {guide_mentor} writes it in the journal.
Polish each coin with your {body_part}. {guide_mentor} cheers — treasure!
Step softly into the butterfly garden. {friend} leads the way through {room}.
Flutter your {body_part} like wings. Twirl slowly!
A {adjective} butterfly lands on your shoulder. Stay still as a statue.
Where does {friend} flutter next?
Land on {count} pretend flowers and sip pretend nectar — slurp!
Spread wings wide. The sun warms you. {friend} dances in the light.
Climb up to the treehouse! Pull yourself up rung by rung in {room}.
Decorate with a {prop} and {count} pretend leaves.
{friend} and {sidekick} swear the secret club oath. Hand on tummy!
What's the club mission?
Lower the spyglass! Spot a pirate ship and signal {friend} with three claps!
Whisper-quiet, list {count} bird names. {sidekick} writes them down.
BOOM! The island volcano in {room} starts to rumble.
{guide_mentor} shouts — RUN! Sprint across the floor.
Leap over {count} pretend lava cracks!
How does {friend} escape the island?
Paddle hard with your {body_part}! Surf the waves to safety.
Hike fast! From the peak, {guide_mentor} signals a rescue plane.
Beep boop! {trickster} powers up in {room}. Music starts!
Move your {body_part} in stiff robot zigzags.
{trickster} picks the next move:
Spin {count} times! {trickster} keeps up — barely!
Freeze in a {adjective} pose! Don't blink for 5 seconds.
Slide left, slide right, clap! {trickster} bows. You win the trophy!
{trickster} has {count} pretend gnomes to hide in {room}.
Tiptoe slowly, place each gnome behind a {prop}.
{friend} closes its eyes — count down, ready or not!
{friend} starts hunting. Help or watch?
Whisper HOT! HOT! COLD! {friend} finds them all giggling.
Bite your lip! {friend} sniffs out {count} gnomes anyway. {trickster} pretends to faint.
A great thunderbird lands in {room}! {friend} climbs onto its back.
Lean forward — WHOOSH! Wind whips your {body_part}.
Spot {count} cloud kingdoms below as you soar.
Where does {friend} steer the thunderbird?
ZAP! Spark across the sky. {friend} laughs as your hair stands up.
Glide down a {adjective} rainbow. Slide on your belly to the ground!
BEEP! {helper_townsperson} pulls up in a yellow taxi outside {room}.
Hop in! Buckle up your imaginary seatbelt — click!
Where to next?
Honk honk! {helper_townsperson} swerves around {count} potholes. Pizza time!
Roll the windows down. Smell the salt — wiggle toes in pretend sand!
Whisper the address. {helper_townsperson} tiptoes the cab there silently.
ALL ABOARD! {sidekick} blows the whistle. The circus train rolls into {room}.
Choo-choo! March in a line, swinging your arms.
{friend} juggles {count} pretend balls. Catch the falling one!
What act comes next?
Walk a tight line on the floor — arms wide for balance!
Swing your {body_part} like a trapeze. Big finale leap!
Dive into the lagoon! Splash with {friend} across {room}.
Wiggle your {body_part} like a fin. Glide silently.
Comb your hair with a {prop} like a mermaid mirror.
What treasure does {friend} discover?
Hold the pearl up — it glows {adjective}! Make a wish.
The starfish tells {count} jokes. Laugh and roll in the pretend waves!
On in 3, 2, 1! {helper_townsperson} sits at the news desk in {room}.
Read the headline loud and clear — pretend a {prop} is the microphone!
What's today's top story?
Bark out {count} headlines! {helper_townsperson} signs off with a paw wave.
Stretch your arms wide — that pancake is HUGE! {helper_townsperson} salutes.
Squint at the {adjective} rainbow. Report what colors with your {body_part}!
Snow falls in {room}! {quest_giver} unrolls a frosty map.
Bundle up — wrap a {prop} as your scarf. Brrr!
Trudge through snow drifts. Lift your {body_part} HIGH each step!
Footprints! Big ones. Who's there?
ROAR... no, just a hug! The yeti squeezes {friend}. So warm!
The yeti peeks. Wave gently — it waves back with one {adjective} paw!
Push the raft into the jungle river of {room}! {friend} steers with a stick.
Paddle hard — swing your {body_part} side to side.
Monkeys swing above! Count {count} of them in the trees.
Waterfall ahead! What do you do?

choices.label: Hold on tight and go over

steps.text: WHOOOSH! Down you go with {friend}! Splash at the bottom!
Pull up on shore. A {adjective} parrot greets you with a squawk.
Welcome to the potion shop! {quest_giver} lights the bubbling cauldron in {room}.
Stir with a big spoon — round and round, {count} times!
Sprinkle a pinch of pretend stardust over the pot.
What potion is {quest_giver} brewing?
Sip a drop — HAHAHA! Roll on the floor giggling.
Flex your {body_part}! Lift a pretend boulder over your head.
Hide behind a {prop} — wave your hand. {quest_giver} pretends not to see you!
WHIRR! {helper_townsperson} climbs into the helicopter in {room}.
Spin your arms — the rotors whirl faster and faster!
Lift off! Lean to one side — bank left!
{needs_saving} is trapped on a cliff. Hover close.
How do you reach {needs_saving}?
Haul up the rope hand over hand! {needs_saving} climbs in safe.
Touch down gently. {needs_saving} hops aboard with a {prop} in hand.
{friend} unrolls a {adjective} kite. Run out into {room}!
Hold up the kite. Wait for the wind — feel it on your {body_part}!
Sprint! Let the string out — the kite climbs high.
How does {friend} steer the kite?
Spin in circles — the kite loops {count} times! {friend} cheers.
Pull the string sharp! The kite swoops and zooms over {friend}'s head.
Dig under {room}! {sidekick} carries a {prop} as a tunnel light.
Crawl on your belly through narrow tunnels — wriggle!
Hold up {count} fingers — that's how many forks ahead.
Which tunnel does {sidekick} pick?
Walls glitter {adjective}! Hold one up to your eye — wow!
SHOUT! The echo bounces back — HELLO, HELLO, HELLO! {sidekick} giggles.
Roll into the skate park in {room}! {friend} grabs a pretend board.
Push off — balance on one {body_part} like you're on wheels.
Drop into the half-pipe! Crouch low then UP UP UP!
What trick does {friend} pull?
POP! Leap into the air {count} times. Stick the landing!
Spin all the way around! {friend} claps wildly.
Slide on a {prop} as the rail. Smooth — that was {adjective}!
Don your chef hats! {trickster} and {friend} face off in the {room} kitchen.
Pretend to flip {count} pancakes. Sploosh! One lands on your head.
Stir a pot with a {prop}. Round and round!
Who wins the cook-off?
Plop! Cake on a plate — upside down! {trickster} bows. Hysterical!
Pour a swirl of {adjective} colors. {friend} earns the spoon trophy!
Boo! {trickster} pops up wearing a {prop} as a ghost sheet in {room}.
Wave your arms! Float like a ghost — slooowly across the floor.
{friend} wants to catch the ghost. How?
STRETCH arms big — GOT YOU! {trickster} laughs and tumbles down.
Tickle your {body_part}! {trickster} can't stay scary and joins in.
Squirrel squad! {sidekick} and {friend} hunt acorns in {room}.
Scamper on all fours — wiggle that tail!
Find {count} pretend acorns and stash them in a {prop}.
Where do you hide your acorn stash?
Reach up high with your {body_part} and tuck them in safe.
Bury them — pat, pat, pat. {friend} adds a {adjective} leaf on top.
Step right up! The carnival opens in {room}. {helper_townsperson} hands you a ticket.
Hear the music — bounce to the beat!
Which game does {friend} try first?
Toss {count} pretend rings — flick of the wrist!
Lift your {body_part} HIGH and SLAM down! Ding-ding-DING!
Grab a duck with a {prop}. The {adjective} duck wins a prize!
A dusty chest sits in the corner of {room}. {quest_giver} examines it.
{count} locks! Each needs a key. Search for clues with {friend}.
Crawl on hands and knees — peek under chairs.
How do you open the final lock?
Shout the {adjective} word and clap! The lid creaks OPEN!
BAM with the {prop}! Chest pops open. {friend} cheers!
Plant a magic bean in {room}! Sprout your {body_part} up, up, UP!
Climb hand over hand. Don't look down!
Reach the clouds. Tiptoe softly — the giant {big_bad_boss} naps.
What treasure do you grab?
Strum invisible strings! The harp plays a {adjective} tune. Run with {friend}!
Tuck the goose under your arm! Down you slide, fast!
Step into a giant snow globe in {room}! {friend} looks around in wonder.
Someone shakes the globe! Twirl as snow swirls around your {body_part}.
Count {count} drifting flakes catching them on your tongue.
{friend} spots something inside. What?
Bend down low — tiptoe past the {adjective} houses. Wave!
Curl up next to the reindeer. Hum quietly. Snow blankets you both.
{guide_mentor} leads down the canyon trail of {room}. Watch your step!
Use a {prop} as a walking stick. Tap, tap, tap.
Squint at the river far below. Wave at {count} rafts!
An echo bounces. What do you shout?
HELLO! Hear it echo {count} times. {guide_mentor} nods, smiling.
Shout BAZOOPLE! The canyon answers BAZOOPLE BAZOOPLE! Roll laughing.
{needs_saving} is a lost puppy somewhere in {room}. {friend} sets out to find it.
Sniff like a tracker — point your nose around the corners!
Listen for whimpers. Cup your {body_part} to your ear.
Where is {needs_saving} hiding?
Crawl in slow. There you are! Scoop up {needs_saving} with a hug.
Peek behind the {prop} — {needs_saving} licks your {body_part}!
{friend} gets a letter from space! Unroll it in {room}.
Aliens drew {count} pictures. Try to figure out what they mean!
Wiggle your {body_part} — that's their hello.
Write back to the aliens — how?
Wave your hand like you're drawing huge faces in the air!
Hum a wobbly melody. {friend} sends it skyward in a {prop}.
Lay a {prop} from couch to floor in {room}. {friend} steadies the bottom.
Add {count} more ramps — zig zag zig!
Drop the pretend marble! Whoooosh — follow it with your {body_part}.
How does the run end?
Spin like a marble in a loop! Three turns then plop into a cup.
BOING! Marble flies. {sidekick} catches it in a {adjective} jar.
Lay down in {room}. Look up — {guide_mentor} points to invisible stars.
Connect {count} stars with your finger in the air.
Whisper the constellation name — {adjective}!
Which shape does {friend} draw next?
Sweep arms wide for the dragon tail. {guide_mentor} marks it down.
Wiggle your nose. Hop {count} times with {friend} on starry tiles.
Squelch into the swamp of {room}! {sidekick} leads carefully.
Squat low — hop like a frog. Ribbit!
Spot {count} pretend lily pads. Hop across each one!
Something bubbles up. What is it?
Tuck your {body_part} into a shell! Wait — peek out slow.
Sssssss — slither along on your belly. {sidekick} hisses too!
Build a fort in {room}! Pile {count} pillows or a {prop}.
Crouch inside with {friend}. Whisper the battle plan!
{frenemy} attacks from the other side! Yell BATTLE STATIONS!
How does {friend} win?
Wiggle fingers! {frenemy} surrenders in a giggle pile.
Launch the pillow! It {adjective} flies over the wall. Victory!
Pile up {count} recyclables in {room}. {sidekick} stacks a {prop} on top.
Tape pretend buttons everywhere. Press one with your {body_part}!
What does your robot do?
BEEP — la-la-la! {sidekick} conducts. Sing along!
Stomp left, stomp right, spin! The {adjective} robot dances!
Why did the robot cross {room}? You shrug — BEEP BOOP HA!
Push through the ivy in {room}. {guide_mentor} finds a hidden door.
Turn the key — twist your {body_part} like a key!
The garden blooms with {count} flowers in seconds!
What does {friend} plant first?
Stretch tall like a sunflower — sway your {adjective} head in the breeze.
Vines spiral up! Climb them with {friend} — hand over hand!
Watch your step! {needs_saving} steps into quicksand in {room}.
Slow! Don't struggle! Wiggle your {body_part} gently.
{friend} runs to help. Grab a {prop}!
How do you pull {needs_saving} free?
Pull together — heave, ho! {count} tugs and {needs_saving} pops free!
Flop flat and roll out slowly. {friend} cheers — {adjective} escape!
All aboard! {helper_townsperson} punches your ticket in {room}.
Choo-choo! March in line, swinging your arms.
Press your {body_part} to the cold pretend window — see the {count} reindeer!
What do you drink on the train?
Slurp pretend cocoa — mmm! {friend} licks a marshmallow mustache.
Pinkies up! Sip with {friend}, giggle, repeat.
{quest_giver} shouts — THE FLOOR IS LAVA in {room}!
Leap onto a cushion! Don't touch the carpet!
Hop {count} pretend islands. Wobble — don't fall!
{quest_giver} adds a twist. Which one?
ONE FOOT ONLY! Wobble {adjective} but stay up!
Balance the {prop} on your head while you jump. Don't drop!
{sidekick} announces — pizza party in {room}!
Roll out pretend dough. Push, pull, stretch with your {body_part}!
Sprinkle {count} pretend toppings — go nuts!
What topping does {friend} pick?
Plop, plop, plop! {friend} flips the pizza. Yum!
Sweet and salty! {sidekick} sniffs — {adjective}!
Marshmallows on pizza?! Giggle and bite anyway!
{helper_townsperson} grabs a clipboard. Time to check on {count} animals in {room}!
Feed the elephants — swing your {body_part} like a trunk!
Refill the monkey bananas with a {prop}.
Which animal needs help?
Move soooo slowly. Yawn big. Curl up {adjective}.
Run around in zigzags. Laugh — HAHAHA! {helper_townsperson} can't keep up!
Kick off your shoes! The bouncy castle waits in {room}.
BOING! Jump with {friend} — higher and higher!
Wiggle every {body_part} mid-air!
What's the challenge?
One, two, three... {count}! High five {sidekick}!
Bounce big then SPLAT — flat on your belly! Giggle hard.
Step out onto the moon! Low gravity in {room}. {friend} bounces slowly.
Bounce, bounce — feel your {body_part} float between hops!
Plant a {prop} as the flag. Wave it slow-mo!
What do you collect on the moon?
Bend slow — pick up each rock. Heavy or light? You decide!
Swirl your hand — the dust glows {adjective}! Sprinkle it everywhere.
{sidekick} and {friend} sit in a circle in {room}. Cup hands around your ear!
Whisper a silly phrase like "{adjective} purple panda".
Pass it along — wiggle your {body_part} when you hear it!
How does the phrase end up?
It came out as gobbledy-goo! {sidekick} falls over giggling.
Hooray! {count} whispers and still right. Group high five!
{quest_giver} unrolls a faded map across the {room} floor.
{friend} marks X with a {prop} on the spot.
Take {count} giant steps east — count loud!
Now what does the map say?
Dig with your {body_part}! Faster, faster — TREASURE!
Shimmy up the tree. Pluck the {adjective} gem hanging there!
Dusk falls in {room}. {friend} spots tiny lights!
Tiptoe slowly — fireflies dance in the air.
Cup your {body_part} gently around one!
Where do you keep the {count} fireflies?
Lid on! {adjective} light glows inside. {friend} smiles softly.
Open your hands. Watch them rise — they twinkle goodbye!
{trickster} grabs a {prop} as a microphone in {room}!
Strum air guitar with your {body_part} — wail!
{friend} drums on imaginary kit. Count: 1, 2, 3, {count}!
What's the song?
Bop bop bop! {trickster} works the crowd. Everyone jumps!
Belt it out slow and {adjective}! Sway side to side.
Hips swing! {friend} adds a funky kick. Concert's a hit!
{trickster} insists there's an invisible friend in {room} named Bloop!
Set out {count} pretend snacks for Bloop. Watch them disappear!
Talk to Bloop. Tilt your {body_part} to listen back.
What does Bloop want to play?
Run from Bloop! {friend} dashes too — was that a tap on your shoulder?
Bloop hides somewhere {adjective}. Sniff and search!
{helper_townsperson} welcomes you to the bookstore in {room}.
Browse the shelves — pick up {count} pretend books.
Read one out loud! Use your most {adjective} voice.
Which book do you take home?
Open it! A dragon pops out — wiggle your {body_part} like wings!
Trace clues with your finger. {helper_townsperson} gives a thumbs up.
Lay out a chessboard in {room}. {friend} faces {frenemy}.
March forward {count} squares — you're a pawn!
Wave your {body_part} like a knight on horseback.
Big move! What does {friend} do?
Slide the king behind a {prop} — safe! {frenemy} groans.
Charge across the board! Capture {frenemy}'s pawn — checkmate {adjective}!
Roll up sleeves! {sidekick} sets up the press in {room}.
Plop {count} pretend apples in the bucket.
Stomp! Stomp with your {body_part}!
How do you sweeten it?
Twirl a {prop} for the cinnamon. Sniff — mmm {adjective}!
Drizzle honey slow. {sidekick} licks pretend spoon. Sweet!
{guide_mentor} welcomes you to the chocolate factory in {room}!
Hop on the conveyor belt — march in place fast!
Catch {count} pretend chocolates. Open wide!
Which room do you visit?
Swim slow with your {body_part}! Splash — chocolate everywhere!
Blow a {adjective} bubble. POP! Sticky everywhere!
{sidekick} is a momma kangaroo! {friend} climbs into the pouch in {room}.
BOING! Hop across the outback. Crouch and spring with your {body_part}!
Spot {count} koalas in pretend trees!
Where to hop next?
Slurp pretend water with cupped hands. {friend} splashes a {adjective} drop.
Big BOUNDS up the dune! Roll down the other side — wheee!
Set up shop in {room}! {sidekick} writes the price sign.
Squeeze {count} pretend lemons — twist your wrists!
Pour the lemonade. Stir with a {prop}.
A customer walks up. Who?
Glug glug! They tip you a {adjective} coin. Wave thank you!
The clown sprays a fake lemon at {sidekick}'s {body_part}! Giggle and dodge!
Bundle up! Polar bears live in {room}. {friend} rubs hands for warmth.
Lumber on all fours. Big bear paws stomp!
Spot {count} pretend ice floes — leap across!
What does {friend} do at the water's edge?
WHEEEE! Slide on your belly across the floor. {adjective} splash!
Stand tall — ROOOOAAAR! Echo bounces around. {friend} shivers and joins.
Park your car in {room}'s car wash. {sidekick} hands you a {prop} sponge.
Spray the windows — pshhh, pshhh!
Scrub circles with your {body_part}!
What comes next?
Wave arms wild — bubble blizzard! Pop {count} of them!
Buff until it sparkles {adjective}! {friend} admires the gleam.
Hitch up the wagon in {room}! {guide_mentor} cracks the reins.
Walk on the trail — clip clop, clip clop!
Cross {count} pretend creeks. Splash with your {body_part}!
What's the trouble ahead?
Pause! Stomp slow in place — buffalo rumble past. Whew!
Push the wagon up the {adjective} pass. Heave! {friend} cheers at the top.
Crawl into the fox den under a {prop} in {room}. {friend} curls beside you.
Wiggle your {body_part} like a fox tail.
Mama fox calls — {count} yips! Echo back.
What does the fox family do?
Sniff around — pluck pretend berries with quick paws. Yum!
Spring up high — POUNCE! Land on a {adjective} flake!
{quest_giver} unrolls a map in {room}. The lost city is hidden!
Hack vines! Swing a {prop} like a machete.
Walk past {count} stone statues — bow as you pass.
How do you unlock the gate?
Tap a rhythm with your {body_part}! The gate creaks open.
Shout the word! {guide_mentor} grins as the city appears.
Fire up the forge in {room}! {sidekick} pumps the bellows.
Pump your {body_part} like the bellows — push, pull, push!
Pick up the {prop} as a hammer. Tap-tap-CLANG!
What does {sidekick} forge?
Cool it in pretend water — pshhhh! Hold it high in triumph!
Shape {count} curves. Nail it to an invisible horse's hoof — clop clop!
{trickster} is an octopus chef in {room}! Wiggle eight arms!
Stir {count} pots at once — round and round!
Toss a {prop} like a pancake high!
What dish does {trickster} serve?
Slurp slurp! Wrap pretend noodles around your {body_part}!
Stir, stir! Bubbles float up — pop them with {adjective} fingers!
Climb to the plane door in {room}! {friend} straps on the parachute.
Stand at the edge — wind whooshes! Take a {adjective} breath.
JUMP! Spread arms wide. Belly down — float!
Pull the cord — but how?
POP! Chute opens — float down softly. Land on your {body_part}.
Fall a little longer — count to {count}! Then chute! Whew!
Mix the batter in {room}! {sidekick} pours a HUGE bowl.
Stir with your {body_part}. Round and round!
Pour onto the pretend griddle — sizzle!
Flip the pancake! How?
WHOOP! Pancake flies — catch it! {count} flips in a row!
Slide it gently — {adjective} flip! Plate it up. Yum!
Wind picks up in {room}! {trickster} announces — TORNADO!
Spin slow then faster — twirl with your {body_part} out!
Pick up {count} loose items — bring them safe!
Tornado swoops in — what now?
Duck and cover! Stay {adjective} still. Storm passes.
Whirl wild! {friend} spins beside you. The tornado spins itself out!
Dive down to the undersea castle in {room}! {quest_giver} leads the way.
{friend} swims slow — sweep your {body_part} like fins.
{count} sea horses guard the gate. Bow politely.
Inside, what room first?
Sit on the pearl throne. Wave at the {adjective} sea king!
Stuff a {prop} sack full of pretend pearls. Jingle home!
Fold paper planes with {friend} in {room}! Crease the {adjective} edges.
Hold high — aim with your {body_part}!
{frenemy} brings out a fancy plane. Show-off!
Whose plane flies farthest?
Spiral, spin, then SOAR! Flies past {count} chairs!
Zooms straight as an arrow! Crashes into a {prop}. Crowd ooohs!
Step into the alpine lodge in {room}. {sidekick} stokes the fire.
Wrap a {prop} as a blanket around your {body_part}.
Sip pretend cocoa with {friend}. Mmm — {adjective}!
What do you do together?
Whisper {count} spooky tales. Giggle at the silly parts!
Spin pretend sticks over flames. POOF — sticky fingers!
{guide_mentor} rings the bell — class begins in {room}!
Lesson one: roar! {friend} ROOOAAAR with your whole {body_part}!
Lesson two: flap. Spread arms wide. Glide around {room}!
Final exam — what skill?
Balance on one foot for {count} seconds. Wobble — but stay!
Exhale slow — pretend smoke curls. {guide_mentor} marks an {adjective} A+.
Welcome to the pet salon! {helper_townsperson} sets up in {room}.
Brush a pretend pup with a {prop}. Long strokes!
Clip {count} pretend toenails — snip, snip!
What style do you give?
Fluff the {adjective} pom-poms! Pup poses for a photo!
Spike up the fur with your {body_part}. Pup struts away. Cool!
Build a giant box kite in {room}! {sidekick} ties on the {prop} string.
Lift it high — hold over your {body_part}!
RUN with {friend}! Wind catches — up, up!
What does the kite do?
Twirl in {count} circles below it! {adjective} dance!
Loop big — write an eight in the sky! {sidekick} cheers loud!
ALL ABOARD! {helper_townsperson} blows the whistle in {room}.
Sprint to platform {count}! Carry a {prop} as luggage.
Hop on the train — CHOO CHOO with your {body_part}!
What's outside the window?
Press nose to the window. Count sheep — one, two, {adjective}!
Lights flash by! Bounce to the rhythm of the rails.
Crouch by the tide pool in {room}. {friend} peers in.
Spot {count} sea creatures! Point with your {body_part}.
Reach in slow — touch a starfish gently.
What else is in the pool?
Wave at the crab — it waves back with one claw! Sidewise scuttle!
Wiggle fingers like an anemone. It closes — {adjective}!
Mountain of mail in {room}! {sidekick} hands {friend} a sorting bin.
Sort {count} letters by color — fast!
Stamp with your {body_part}! BAM BAM BAM!
A package wiggles. What's inside?
Yip yip! Pups bounce out. Catch them with a {prop}!
Balls everywhere! Bounce around the {adjective} room!
Hoot! An owl flies into {room} with a scroll for {friend}.
Stretch your {body_part} like a perch.
Untie the scroll — read by candlelight. {count} words of magic!
What does the scroll say?
Pack a {adjective} bag with a {prop}. Set out at dawn!
Wave hands and chant! Sparkles rain. {friend} grins big.
Set the table in {room}! {helper_townsperson} pours pretend tea.
Pinkies up! Sip with your {body_part}.
Pass {count} pretend scones — politely!
What do you talk about?
Lean in close — whisper {adjective} tales. Giggle behind a {prop}.
{friend} points at hidden bunnies. Wave hello — they wave back!
Slip on pretend skates in {room}! {friend} wobbles onto the ice.
Glide — push with your {body_part}!
Stretch arms wide. Twirl {count} times slow!
Big finale move?
Jump! Spin! Land! Crowd ROARS — {adjective} performance!
Sit and spin like a top. {friend} cheers!
{trickster} hides a needle (pretend!) in a haystack in {room}.
Dig with your {body_part}! Wiggle through hay!
Sneeze — ACHOO {count} times!
Found it! How did you spot it?
Hold it up — sparkle sparkle! {friend} cheers loud!
OUCH! Jump high then laugh. Got it anyway!
Welcome to the robot zoo in {room}! {sidekick} powers up.
Stiff-walk like a robot tiger — ROOOAR-BEEP!
Watch {count} mechanical monkeys swing!
Which robot animal do you feed?
Toss a {prop} into its tank! Slurp — beep beep!
Reach high — stretch your {body_part} to feed leaves. {adjective}!
{guide_mentor} leads to the volcano edge in {room}. Hot!
Sniff the {adjective} smoke. Cover your {body_part}!
Drop a {prop} as a sensor. Watch it bounce {count} times!
Volcano alert! What now?
Sprint with {friend}! Leap over rocks. Phew!
Use a long stick — scoop carefully! {guide_mentor} pumps a fist.
Dump {count} giant puzzle pieces across {room}! {sidekick} sorts edges.
Crawl around — match colors with your {body_part}!
Fit a {prop} as a placeholder for a missing piece. Hilarious!
What's the picture?
Last piece! TADA — gallop around the room with {friend}!
Wave farewell — set sail! Tilt as the waves roll under.
Sshh! {sidekick} plans a surprise party in {room} for {friend}!
Hang {count} pretend streamers. Tape with your {body_part}!
Hide behind a {prop}. Wait for {friend}!
POP OUT! What does {friend} do?
EEEE! Jump up and down — {adjective} happy dance!
Big group hug. Sway side to side. Best day ever.
Stand under the tallest tree in {room}. {friend} looks UP!
Grab the lowest branch with your {body_part}. Pull up!
Climb {count} branches. Don't look down!
What's at the top?
Peek inside — {adjective} blue eggs! Whisper a hello.
Grab a {prop}-thick rope. Swing wide with {friend}!
Spread a {prop} blanket in {room}. {friend} sits cross-legged.
Unpack {count} pretend sandwiches. Tiny bites!
Wave bees away with your {body_part} — gentle!
What game do you play after?
WHEEE! Roll roll roll! Grass tickles. Tumble to a stop!
Hum sweet tunes with {friend}. Sway side to side.
Climb into the mole express! {sidekick} drives through {room}.
Dive low — wriggle on your belly!
Honk a horn made of a {prop}! BONK BONK!
Avoid {count} pretend roots. Duck and weave!
Where do you tunnel to?
Wiggle in line for {adjective} worm noodles. Slurp!
Browse stalls with {friend}. Bargain with your {body_part}!
Light the silly torch in {room}! {friend} jogs in slo-mo.
Event 1: hop on one {body_part} for {count} seconds!
Event 2: balance a {prop} on your head!
Big finale event?
Wave arms like wet noodles — {adjective}! {frenemy} surrenders!
Walk backwards on hands and feet — race to the finish!
{guide_mentor} sets up the giant telescope in {room}.
Squint into the lens — wide one {body_part}!
Spot {count} planets in a row. Whisper their names!
Tilt the scope — what now?
Trace its tail with your finger across the sky!
Spin in a circle like a ring around a planet! {guide_mentor} smiles.
{sidekick} sets a {prop} of pretend jellybeans on the {room} table.
Stare close. Squint your {body_part}!
Guess — {count} hundred? More? Less?
How does {friend} figure it out?
Tap and count — 10, 20, {adjective} 30! Almost right!
Sniff and giggle — that's lemon! Strawberry! Bubble gum!
Lie down on the floor of {room}. {friend} points UP!
Spot the first streak! Trace it with your {body_part}!
Count {count} meteors. Make a {adjective} wish on each!
What does {friend} wish for?

choices.label: A space rocket of your own

steps.text: Roll over giggling — a sparkle pup lands! Pet softly.
Build a rocket from a {prop}. Climb in — count down!
{friend} boards the silver submarine docked in {room}.
Pull the periscope down and scan in a slow circle.
Dive! Crouch low as bubbles rush past the porthole.
What does {friend} spot in the deep?
Eight curly arms wave at you and {friend} waves back with both hands.
You polish the {adjective} stone with a sleeve until it shines like new.
{friend} climbs into the basket — the balloon fest fills the sky above {room}!
Pull the burner cord and whoosh a flame up high.
Float past {count} other balloons and wave at every pilot.
A {adjective} cloud floats by — reach out and grab a handful of fluff.
Touch down on a soft hill. {friend} declares it the best ride ever.
{guide_mentor} ties the rope and points up the snowy mountain in {room}.
Step up cushion to cushion — no touching the floor lava!
Wind howls at the high pass — pull a scarf tight.
Two trails to the peak — which one does {guide_mentor} pick?
You crawl on hands and feet across the {adjective} ridge and pop out at the summit.
You duck through a cave and out the other side — the summit cheers your name.
The old windmill in {room} won't turn — {friend} investigates.
Climb the spiral stairs by stepping up and around in a slow circle.
Find {count} stuck gears and turn each one by hand.
Push the great wooden blade with all your might!
Wind catches and the blades spin! {friend} cheers from the rooftop.
{friend} climbs the spiral stairs of the lighthouse over {room}.
Polish the great lamp until it shines like a star.
Spot a ship lost in the fog — it needs your beam!
How does {friend} guide the ship home?
On-off-on-off — you blink the beam {count} times and the ship steers safe.
DONG! DONG! You ring with both hands and the ship follows the sound.
{quest_giver} pitches a tent in the desert dunes of {room}.
Sip from the waterskin — pretend a {adjective} gulp.
Stars come out — point at {count} of the brightest ones.
A sandstorm rolls in! Crouch low and cover your head.
Morning sun rises — {quest_giver} packs camp and the trek continues.
The ice castle in {room} belongs to {big_bad_boss} — {friend} sneaks closer.
Slide across the frozen floor by swooshing your feet.
Find the secret hallway behind a shimmering {prop}.
How does {friend} get past the throne room?

choices.label: Melt the door with a fire spell

steps.text: Snap your fingers and pretend a warm glow — the door drips and opens.
Tiptoe-tiptoe-tiptoe — you slip past {big_bad_boss} who is fast asleep.
{friend} swings open the greenhouse doors in {room} — plants everywhere!
Water {count} tall flowers with an imaginary watering can.
A vine wiggles and waves — wave your {body_part} back to say hi.
Pick a {adjective} fruit and sniff it deeply.
A sunflower turns to face {friend} and sings hello.
{guide_mentor} unlocks the observatory dome in {room}.
Crank the big telescope by spinning your arms in slow circles.
Spot {count} planets through the eyepiece — describe each one.
A comet streaks past! Trace its tail with your finger.
{guide_mentor} writes your discoveries in the great star journal.
{friend} slips on the snorkel mask — the reef of {room} is bright today!
Kick slow and float — the fish are all around.
A {adjective} clownfish darts past — try to copy its wiggle.
Where does {friend} swim next?
You wave your arms like swaying kelp and slip right through.
A slow {adjective} turtle lets {friend} ride on its shell — kick gentle, kick gentle.
{quest_giver} reigns over the cloud kingdom above {room}.
Skip from cloud to cloud — every leap is a {adjective} bounce!
Collect {count} cloud puffs in your arms — squeeze them gently.
A rainbow bridge appears — walk it carefully toe-to-toe.
{quest_giver} crowns you Royal Cloudwalker. Bow deep!
{trickster} drags you into the noisy junkyard at {room}.
Dig through a pile by swinging your arms like shovels.
Find {count} {adjective} gadgets — name what each one used to be.
{trickster} grins — which gadget gets fixed up first?
You stack pillows and pretend to launch! {trickster} pretends it whooshes the wrong way — typical.
Pop! Out flies a paper note that {trickster} reads in a silly voice.
{friend} kicks off shoes — the beach at {room} is warm today!
Hunt for {count} seashells in the sand by patting the ground.
A {adjective} crab scuttles past — sidestep along with it!
Build a sandcastle by patting pretend sand into towers.
A wave crashes! Jump back laughing as the foam tickles your toes.
{friend} ties on an apron — the bakery in {room} opens at sunrise.
Knead the dough by squishing your fists open and closed {count} times.
Slide the tray into a pretend hot oven — careful!
What does {friend} bake today?
Pipe icing in {adjective} swirls and add a tiny sprinkle on top.
Twist your arms into a pretzel shape — {friend} bows at the puzzle.
{friend} grabs the giant pretend steering wheel at the {room} bus station.
Honk the horn {count} times for the passengers waiting.
Stop at each station and announce the {adjective} stop name.
A turn comes — lean your {body_part} hard to the left!
Last stop — everyone offboards and waves goodbye to {friend}.
{sidekick} cracks open the airlock — the moon base sits on the dust outside {room}.
Hop in slow-mo — every step a long, floaty leap.
Plant a flag and bow to it ceremoniously.
A meteor is incoming — what does {sidekick} do?

choices.label: Shield the base with a force field

steps.text: You curl up small in a {adjective} crater until the rocks stop falling.
Hold both arms up in a dome shape — VWOOM! The shield holds!
{friend} grabs a tube — the waterpark in {room} is open!
Climb the {adjective} slide steps one at a time, hands and feet.
WHOOSH down the slide — wave your arms wild!
Splash through the wave pool with {count} big jumps.
Float on the lazy river — drift on your back and breathe.
{friend} shrinks small and dives into the snow globe on the shelf in {room}.
Snow drifts down slowly — catch flakes with your tongue (pretend!).
Skate across the frozen pond in {adjective} curves.
Who does {friend} meet at the tiny village?
Build the snowman taller by stacking pretend snowballs three high — he tips his hat.
Jingle, jingle — pull the {prop} sled and the reindeer pulls you back!
{quest_giver} sets the table for tea in {room}.
Pour {count} tiny cups of pretend tea — pinky out!
Pass a {adjective} biscuit around the circle politely.
Tell {quest_giver} a story in your fanciest voice.
Toast! Clink invisible cups and giggle together.
{friend} pulls back the blanket door — welcome to the clubhouse in {room}!
Make the secret handshake — {count} claps and a spin.
Vote on the {adjective} club name by raising your {body_part}.
Build a fort wall taller with two more cushions.
Sing the clubhouse anthem together at the top of your lungs!
{helper_townsperson} opens the cat cafe in {room} — meow!
Pet {count} pretend cats softly along the back.
A kitten climbs your {body_part} — hold very still!
Which {adjective} kitty wins the cuddle prize?
Scoop the fluffy kitty up and snuggle gently — purr-purr-purr.
Hold out your hand low — the shy kitty creeps over and headbutts you.
{friend} dusts off the storybook shop in {room}.
Open {count} books — peek at the {adjective} pictures inside.
Read a line in your silliest voice for {friend}.
A book glows — a tiny dragon pops out and zooms around!
Catch the dragon gently and tuck it back inside the cover.
{sidekick} buzzes excitedly — a giant honeycomb in {room}!
Buzz like a bee from corner to corner of the room.
Find {count} {adjective} flowers to sip from.
Which path leads to the honey jar?
Skip through the field with arms wide — you arrive sticky and happy.
Tiptoe-tiptoe-tiptoe past the snoring bear and grab the jar.
{friend} grips the windsurf bar — the bay outside {room} is choppy today.
Lean into the wind with your whole {body_part}!
Carve a {adjective} turn around the buoy.
A big wave — duck-dive under it!
Cross the finish line — {friend} pumps a fist in the air!
{quest_giver} leads the parade down the main street of {room}.
March in step — left, right, left for {count} beats.
Wave at the crowd with a {adjective} smile.
Toss pretend confetti up high — it sparkles down!
End at the town square — bow deep with {quest_giver}.
{friend} cradles the warm dragon egg found in {room}.
Rock it gently in your arms — humm a low tune.
CRACK! A bit of shell breaks off — peek inside!
What color is the baby dragon?
The {adjective} blue dragon hiccups and a tiny puff of frost floats out!
The red dragon sneezes and a {prop} catches a tiny harmless spark — woah!
{guide_mentor} clicks on the lantern — the mossy cave in {room} glows green.
Duck under {count} low rocks by bending your knees deep.
Touch the {adjective} moss — it tingles!
A bat flutters by — wave it gently back to its perch.
Find a quiet pool — {guide_mentor} bottles a drop of glowing water.
{friend} unrolls the kite string in the windy field of {room}.
Run with the kite trailing — your {body_part} pumps fast!
The kite catches air! Hold tight — it tugs hard.
A second kite zooms close — what does {friend} do?
Both strings twirl into a {adjective} double knot — friends forever!
Let out more string and zoom — {friend}'s kite reaches the top of the sky!
{quest_giver} hands you the quest scroll outside the swamp in {room}.
Hop from log to log — only {count} dry spots to land!
A frog ribbits a question — answer with a {adjective} ribbit back!
Spot a glowing flower deep in the reeds.
Pluck the flower carefully — quest complete! {quest_giver} bows.
{guide_mentor} fires up the star forge deep in {room}.
Pump the bellows — push your arms in and out {count} times.
Sprinkle stardust into the flame — make a {adjective} wish!
Pull out a sparkling new star with iron tongs.
Toss the star up — it floats to the ceiling and twinkles.
{trickster} opens the gadget briefcase in {room} — pick a tool!
Snap on a {adjective} disguise mustache.
Test the laugh-decoder — chuckle into it three times.
Which gadget does {trickster} hand you for the mission?
Tippy-toe across the floor without one sound — {trickster} gives a thumbs up.
Toss the paper — it loops back and bonks {trickster} on the nose. Hilarious!
{friend} hears the ice cream jingle outside {room}!
Run to the window with the most {adjective} smile.
Order {count} scoops — count them out on your fingers.
Pretend the cone is wobbly — balance with your tongue!
Share a lick with {friend} — yum yum yum!
{guide_mentor} winds the great time-watch in {room}.
Step into the {adjective} portal — twirl three times!
Land somewhere new — look around carefully.
Which era did the watch send {guide_mentor} to?
Stomp like a big dino — {count} ground-shaking steps and a roar.
Hop on a hover-platform (a cushion!) and ride the {adjective} skylane.
{helper_townsperson} sorts a tower of envelopes in {room}.
Stamp {count} letters by thumping your fist on each one.
A {adjective} envelope wiggles by itself — careful!
Open it — out flutters a paper bird that flies a loop.
Catch the bird gently and post it back. {helper_townsperson} bows.
{friend} rolls up sleeves — the paint shop in {room} is open!
Pick {count} bright colors from the shelf.
Splatter a {adjective} canvas with big swings of your arm.
Add finger dots all around the edges — boop boop boop.
Hold up the masterpiece — {friend} gasps in awe!
{friend} grabs cushions — {room} becomes Fort HQ!
Stack {count} pillows into a wall — careful, careful!
Drape a {adjective} blanket as the roof.
Crawl inside and announce the fort name in a deep voice.
Defend the fort by tossing soft socks — pew pew!
{guide_mentor} powers up the teleporter pad in {room}.
Step onto the {adjective} glowing circle.
Countdown from {count} — close your eyes!
Where does the teleporter beam {guide_mentor}?
Hop branch to branch — wave hello to the tiny villagers in the boughs.
Float between glowing bookshelves — pick a book with a {adjective} cover.
{helper_townsperson} shows you the pear garden behind {room}.
Stretch on tippy-toes to pick {count} ripe pears.
Polish each pear on your {body_part} until it shines.
A {adjective} squirrel sneaks one — chase gently!
Share a slice with {helper_townsperson} — crunch crunch crunch!
{sidekick} climbs into the minecart in the tunnels under {room}.
Pump your arms — the cart picks up speed down the tracks.
Duck under a {adjective} low beam!
The track splits — which way does {sidekick} steer?
Sparkles everywhere! Scoop up {count} pretend gems and stuff your pockets.
Hold on tight! Lean back-back-back as the cart loops upside-down.
{friend} spreads owl wings — moonlight pours into {room}.
Hoot {count} times into the {adjective} sky.
Glide low — arms wide, body still.
Spot a mouse below — swoop in slow motion!
Land softly on a branch — {friend} blinks big slow blinks.
{friend} discovers a mushroom ring tucked in {room}.
Step inside — the air goes {adjective} sparkly!
Count the mushrooms — there are {count} in a perfect circle.
What does the fairy ring grant {friend}?
You shrink to ant-size — the {prop} looks like a mountain now! Whoa.
You grow tall as a tree — pretend to peek over the roof of {room}!
{friend} blasts the tugboat horn outside {room}.
Steer the wheel — left-right-left in {adjective} swoops.
Loop a rope around a barge by lassoing your {body_part}!
Chug-chug forward — pull {count} barges in a line.
Dock at the pier — bow to the dock crew.
{friend} struts into the dance hall set up in {room}.
Warm up — wiggle every part of your body!
Listen for the beat — bop your {body_part} to the rhythm.
What dance does {friend} call?
Spin spin spin — {count} twirls and freeze in a {adjective} pose!
Sway side to side — slow, slow, slow — eyes closed, breathe deep.
{friend} fires up the snowplow outside {room}!
Push forward steady — clear a {adjective} path.
Watch for {count} snow drifts to bust through.
Stop to wave at sleepy neighbors shoveling.
Park the plow — {friend} stomps snow off their boots.
{guide_mentor} stirs the bubbling pot in {room}.
Drop in {count} pinches of a {adjective} ingredient.
Stir clockwise with your whole {body_part}!
Sniff the steam — does it smell like dessert? Or socks?
A glittery pop! The potion is ready. Toast with {guide_mentor}!
{friend} clutches the tickets — the amusement park in {room} is HUGE!
Pick a {adjective} ride first — point with both hands!
Hop in line and bounce with excitement.
Which ride does {friend} choose?
Hands up! Lean into {count} big loops — wheeeeee!
Steer wildly — gentle bumps and laughs all around with {friend}.
{friend} stretches at the starting dock at {room}.
Push off! Paddle hard — both arms, {count} big strokes.
Round the {adjective} buoy — lean into the turn!
Sprint the final stretch with a roar.
Cross the line! {friend} raises a paddle in triumph.
{friend} spreads a blanket on the lawn outside {room}.
BANG! Look up — a {adjective} burst paints the sky.
Count {count} fireworks in different shapes.
Oooh and aaaah louder than ever before!
The grand finale — clap and clap and clap!
{guide_mentor} points at the spinning weather vane on top of {room}.
Predict the {adjective} weather by sniffing the air.
The vane spins {count} times fast — wind is coming!
Hold onto your hat — lean into the gust!
Then a rainbow appears — point at every color with {guide_mentor}.
{quest_giver} cracks open the museum doors in {room}.
A {adjective} suit of armor waves hello.
Tiptoe past {count} sleeping exhibits.
Which exhibit does {quest_giver} unlock?
Hop on a broom — zoom around the room dodging chandeliers!
The portraits chat in funny voices — chat back in your silliest one.
{sidekick} flips on the helmet light under {room}.
Crawl through the {adjective} tunnel on hands and knees.
Listen — drip-drip-drip echoes for {count} beats.
Find a wide chamber — gasp at the cave painting.
Climb back up — {sidekick} cheers your bravery.
{frenemy} crashes the picnic in {room} — sandwiches everywhere!
Share {count} {adjective} sandwiches anyway.
Slurp lemonade noisily — {frenemy} slurps louder!
Belch contest — say excuse-me with a giggle.
{frenemy} grumbles, then admits this was actually fun.
{friend} drags you to the carnival set up in {room}.
Pick a ticket — {count} options in the prize basket.
Hop on the spinning teacup — buckle in!
Which way does the cup spin?
Round and round — your {body_part} flops to the side! Hold on!
The other way! Lean opposite — {friend} squeals laughing.
{friend} kneels by {count} houseplants in {room}.
Whisper a {adjective} secret to the tallest one.
Listen — does it wiggle back? Lean close!
Water gently with a make-believe cup.
The plant leans toward {friend} — friends forever!
{trickster} grins — the cornfield maze near {room} is open!
Step in — tall stalks tower {count} feet over your head.
{trickster} hides behind a {adjective} stalk — find them!
Two paths — which one does {trickster} fake left toward?
GOTCHA! You feint and dart the other way — {trickster} laughs in surprise.
Wave your arms wild — sticky web (just yarn!) clings to your hair.
{friend} spots a {adjective} shadow on the floor of {room}.
Try to step on the shadow — it darts away!
Make {count} silly poses — what shape is your shadow now?
Stretch tall, scrunch small — shadow does it too.
Tag your own shadow finally — you win!
{guide_mentor} stokes the campfire ring in {room}.
Roast {count} pretend marshmallows on a stick.
Hum a {adjective} tune softly with the group.
Listen to a story whispered over the flames.
Look up — the sky is dotted with stars.
{helper_townsperson} unlocks the library in {room} — shhh!
Tiptoe between {count} tall shelves on careful feet.
Find a {adjective} book with sparkles on the cover.
Read one line in the smallest whisper you can.
{helper_townsperson} smiles and stamps your library card.
{trickster} holds up one {adjective} sock — where's the other?
Hunt {count} sneaky spots — behind couches, under tables.
Peek into a basket — nope, only socks-of-mystery!
Sniff like a sock-detective — wiggle your nose.
Found it! On your own {body_part} the whole time! Hah!
{friend} unrolls a fresh blueprint in the {room} workshop.
Sketch a {adjective} contraption with big swooping lines.
Gather {count} parts from around the room.
What does {friend} invent first?
Twirl your hand — stir-stir-stir! The soup spins by itself!
Pull back — FWOOSH! Pillows fly across the room (gently!).
{quest_giver} raises the baton in the {room} choir hall.
Warm up your voice — sing 'meeeeee' {count} times.
Hum a {adjective} low note that rattles your {body_part}.
Belt the highest note ever — hold it loooong!
Bow together — the audience claps wildly.
{guide_mentor} unfurls a glowing scroll in {room}.
Read step {count} — {adjective} stardust by the pinch.
Stir the cauldron with your strongest {body_part}!
Add a sparkle — wave your fingers over the pot.
Taste with {guide_mentor} — yum, like rainbow!
{sidekick} points at the sky — a storm is racing in to {room}!
Sprint across the field, {count} long strides.
Skid through a {adjective} puddle with both feet!
Beat the storm by which route?
Duck under — drip-drip echoes! You make it safe with {sidekick}.
Climb fast — at the top you see the rainbow! Storm passes.
{friend} pilots the starship toward the dock at {room}.
Activate {count} thrusters — pulse your palms out.
Tilt the {adjective} ship right and left — careful!
Slow approach — match the dock's spin slowly.
Clamp on! Hatch hisses open. {friend} salutes the crew.
{boss_mini_boss} guards the magma forge inside {room}.
Negotiate with a {adjective} bow and a big smile.
Forge {count} tiny sparking nails with a hammer swing!
{boss_mini_boss} nods approval — you've earned the forge mark.
{friend} cheers as you walk out a master smith.
{friend} steps to the cloud-diving platform above {room}.
Check the parachute — pull the {adjective} cord.
DIVE! Spread arms wide and whooosh!
Through which cloud does {friend} dive first?
Pillow soft! Bounce {count} times before drifting through.
Colors swirl all around — wave your hands to splash through them!
{quest_giver} unlocks the sunken palace below {room}.
Swim slow through corridors — {count} pillars on each side.
Touch a {adjective} mosaic — it lights up under your hand!
A throne sits empty — {quest_giver} dusts it off.
Sit gently — bubbles tickle your nose! Giggle.
{friend} swings out over the city skyline of {room}.
Leap across {count} rooftops with big strides!
Catch the wind in a {adjective} gust — glide!
Wave at the people below — they wave back.
Land softly on the tallest tower with {friend}.
{friend} buckles the helmet at the trailhead near {room}.
Pedal hard — pump your {body_part} {count} times!
Bunny-hop over a {adjective} root!
Which trail does {friend} pick at the split?
Tuck low — zoom! The trees blur past as you whoop with joy.
Pedal gentle — wave at chipmunks and breathe the fresh air.
{trickster} spots {count} dust bunnies hiding in {room}!
Sneak up tiptoe — they're {adjective} and shy!
Catch one with a soft cloth — be gentle!
They squeak a tiny squeak — squeak back!
Set them free in a safe corner — {trickster} salutes.
{friend} dips a wand in soap — bubbles fill {room}!
Blow {count} {adjective} bubbles in a row.
Pop them with your {body_part} — pop pop pop!
Catch one gently — it floats on your fingertip.
Send a giant bubble out the door — bye bubble!
{friend} lays out the rule book in {room}.
Stretch every {body_part} — get ready!
Count down from {count} like a judge with a deep voice.
Which record does {friend} attempt first?
Go go go — count loudly! Arms up, arms down!
Scrunch your face for as long as possible — hold it, hold it!
{friend} sets up the lemonade stand on the corner of {room}.
Squeeze {count} pretend lemons — squish squish!
Stir in {adjective} sugar with big circular swings.
Call to customers in your loudest voice!
Pour a cup and clink with {friend} — cheers!
{guide_mentor} leads the cosmic zoo tour through {room}.
See {count} bouncing space-bunnies — hop like them!
Feed the {adjective} star-giraffe a pretend leaf.
A planet-bear roars — roar back with all your chest!
End at the gift shop — {guide_mentor} hands you a sticker.
{friend} packs the first snowball in front of {room}.
Stack snow blocks {count} high — wall up the fort!
Make a {adjective} snowball pile — be ready!
Incoming snowball! How does {friend} dodge?
Crouch low — SPLAT on the wall! Safe!
Leap up and toss back — your pretend throw is huge! No-touch wins all around.
{friend} spots {needs_saving} stranded on a tiny island in {room}.
Lash {count} logs into a raft by miming knots.
Paddle hard — {adjective} strokes on both sides!
Reach the island — pull {needs_saving} aboard with care.
Paddle back together. Cheers ring out!
{sidekick} sniffs the autumn leaves outside {room}.
Pat the {adjective} ground — feel for hidden acorns.
Stash {count} acorns in your pocket — careful, careful!
A squirrel watches with a tilted head.
Leave one acorn for the squirrel — {sidekick} approves!
{guide_mentor} clicks the flashlight at the mouth of the cave by {room}.
Crawl through — {count} feet of {adjective} tunnel.
A stream trickles — splash gently with your fingers.
Which chamber does {guide_mentor} explore first?
Walls sparkle! Touch one — it chimes like a bell.
Tiny bats wave wings — wave back with both arms gently.
{friend} steps out into the meadow beside {room} at dusk.
Count {count} flashing fireflies dancing low.
Chase one gently — twirl in {adjective} arcs.
Cup hands around one — peek inside at the glow!
Let it go — it spirals up into the stars.
{friend} jogs through the spaceport in {room} — gates closing!
Scan {count} {adjective} passports at the checkpoint.
Race to gate B7 — only minutes to spare!
Which shuttle does {friend} board?

choices.label: The slow tour to the asteroid belt

steps.text: Strap in — countdown {count}, 3-2-1 BLAST! Wave goodbye to gravity.
Settle in by the window — point at {adjective} asteroids tumbling by.
{boss_mini_boss} blocks the gem mine entrance in {room} — bow to enter.
Swing a {adjective} pickaxe — chip chip chip!
Spot {count} sparkling gems in the wall.
Polish one on your sleeve — it glows!
{boss_mini_boss} grunts approval. {friend} pockets the gem.
